import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut cur = 0
    mut has = false
    mut neg = false
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
          has = true
        else if b == 45
          neg = true
        else
          if has
            if neg
              nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
            else
              nums = list.push(nums, cur)
            end
            cur = 0
            has = false
            neg = false
          end
        end
      when None
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if has
      if neg
        nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
      else
        nums = list.push(nums, cur)
      end
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut sum = 0
    mut first = true
    for x in nums
      sum = sum + x
      if first
        out = "#{sum}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{sum}"
      end
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
